explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Yum China's published materials reference pilot phases for AI initiatives and the incorporation of future feedback. These materials also describe the integration of AI into business functions to support operational decision-making.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by describing the AI assistant's capabilities, its intended function as a partner beyond efficiency, and its role in providing intelligent decision support. Evidence for governance is found in the mention of pilot phases, future feedback incorporation, and the integration of AI into business functions for operational decision-making.
relevant_sources.title: Yum China launches AI assistant for store managers

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Yum China's published materials describe the capabilities of its AI assistant for store managers. These materials also outline the AI assistant's intended function as a partner beyond efficiency and its role in providing intelligent decision support.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by describing the AI assistant's capabilities, its intended function as a partner beyond efficiency, and its role in providing intelligent decision support. Evidence for governance is found in the mention of pilot phases, future feedback incorporation, and the integration of AI into business functions for operational decision-making.
relevant_sources.title: Yum China launches AI assistant for store managers

summary.overall_findings: Published materials from Yum China Holdings describe the AI assistant's capabilities and its intended function as a partner beyond efficiency. Additionally, governance disclosures reference pilot phases for AI initiatives and future feedback incorporation. These practices address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars at the policy level. Based on a review of 11 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
